name: Easy Cheese and Shrimp Gyozas (East/west)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Medium shrimp (41 to 50 per pound), shelled and deveined
1 tsp Finely minced ginger or ginger juice
2 tsp Shao Hsing wine or dry sherry
1 1/4 cup Grated Monterey Jack cheese (about 5 ounces)
1 Package (12 to 16 ounces) round siu mai wrappers or won ton wrappers
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the filling by combining shrimp, salt, ginger, Shao Hsing wine, cornstarch, water chestnuts, green onions, coriander, and Chinese sausages in a bowl.
2. Place the cheese on a separate plate.
3. Lay out the dumpling wrappers and place a spoonful of filling near one end.
4. Wet the edges of the wrapper with water to seal.
5. Fold the wrapper into a triangle shape, pleating as needed.
6. Repeat until all wrappers are used.
7. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add dumplings in batches and cook for 2-3 minutes or until they float to the surface.
8. Remove the dumplings from the boiling water using a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
9. Serve hot with dipping sauce.
